en.name: Clown Clan Hat
en.pendulumEffect: During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Clown Clan" card from your Deck to your GY, except a Pendulum Monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot activate the effects of monsters Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck until the end of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "Clown Clan Hat" once per turn.

ja.name: 道化の一座 ハット
